title: Next-day readiness forecasting code and reproducibility materials in elite women's football
description: Reproducible analysis code, manuscript source, figures, tables, and documentation for a secondary analysis of publicly available SoccerMon subjective-monitoring data. Version 1.1.1 corrects the implementation of the non-selected unpenalised candidate, aligns reporting terminology with the implemented readiness-reporting features, improves output verification, and resolves manuscript, table, figure, and metadata consistency issues. A clean rerun confirmed that the selected penalties and all reported primary and wellness-item-missingness sensitivity estimates are unchanged. The original SoccerMon dataset is not redistributed.
